refresh_cadence: daily check; publish after new tournament/event detection

fields.name: placement
fields.description: Final placement for the team in the event

fields.name: slot_number
fields.description: Roster slot (1-6) for the team member row

fields.name: pokemon_name
fields.description: Roster Pokémon name as reported by MunchStats

fields.name: form_name
fields.description: Roster form label prior to normalization, if reported

fields.name: source_url
fields.description: Page or endpoint the record was extracted from

fields.name: dataset_version
fields.description: Dataset version this staging snapshot feeds

known_risks: Roster naming inconsistencies that reduce automated match confidence
